seoTitle: Uno vs Upper Hermitage — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Uno and Upper Hermitage. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Uno vs Upper Hermitage: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Uno and Upper Hermitage.
heading: Uno vs Upper Hermitage — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Uno, South Australia and Upper Hermitage, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Hermitage has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Uno (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Uno or Upper Hermitage safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Uno has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Upper Hermitage scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Uno scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Hermitage scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Uno or Upper Hermitage?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Hermitage has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
